pipes.name: MoneyPipe
pipes.description:
Angular pipe for formatting Money values in templates.

Example :
<!-- Display Money with default locale -->
<span>{{ plannedAmount | money }}</span>
___COMPODOC_EMPTY_LINE___
<!-- Display Money with custom locale -->
<span>{{ plannedAmount | money:'en-US' }}</span>
pipes.rawdescription: Angular pipe for formatting Money values in templates. ```html {{ plannedAmount | money }} ___COMPODOC_EMPTY_LINE___ {{ plannedAmount | money:'en-US' }} ```
